name: Shepherd's Pie Nov. 87
recipeInstructions:
1. Grind roast beef.
2. Brown meat in butter and oil.
3. Stir in onion and garlic, cook until onion starts changing color.
4. Stir in mushrooms, cook until liquid has evaporated.
5. Season with salt and pepper. Stir in flour, cook for 1 minute.
6. Add cognac, cook over high heat until it evaporates.
7. Add wine, cook until wine has evaporated.
8. Stir in tomato, broth, and thyme. Bring to a boil, simmer covered for 1.5 hours, adding more broth if needed.
9. Stir in Worcestershire sauce, cook for 10 minutes. Set aside.
10. Prepare potatoes:
11. Cook potatoes with their skins on. Let cool slightly.
12. Peel potatoes, mash them, adding butter, milk, salt, pepper, and nutmeg.
13. Place the prepared meat in a baking dish.
14. Spread mashed potatoes on top.
15. Brush the top with egg yolk.
16. Bake at 350°F for 30 minutes or until the top is golden.
